detail.description: Leo Rivas doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Michael Harris II. Jhonny Pereda to 3rd.
Leo Rivas singles on a line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone.
Leo Rivas singles on a line drive to center fielder Zack Gelof.
Leo Rivas doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Cole Young scores.
Leo Rivas singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith.
Leo Rivas singles on a ground ball to right fielder Aaron Judge.
Leo Rivas singles on a ground ball to right fielder Aaron Judge.
Leo Rivas singles on a line drive to right fielder Chase DeLauter. Dominic Canzone scores. Cole Young to 3rd.
Leo Rivas triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Leo Rivas singles on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Leo Rivas singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II. J.P. Crawford scores. Mitch Garver scores. Cole Young to 2nd.
Leo Rivas singles on a line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. Randy Arozarena scores. Cole Young scores. Mitch Garver to 2nd.
Leo Rivas singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
